name: Memory Dump via Adplus
description: Detects the use of `adplus.exe` with specific command-line arguments indicative of an attempt to dump the LSASS process memory. This is a common technique used by attackers to obtain credentials.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was created, which should be 'adplus.exe'.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute adplus.exe, including arguments indicative of memory dumping (e.g., -hang, -pn, -pmn, -p, -po, -c, -sc).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which adplus.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
